Metadata.title: Cal Text - Your calorie tracker that lives in your texts
Metadata.description: Send a photo or describe your meal. AI handles the rest — calories, macros, streaks, all in iMessage.

Hero.headline: Track calories from your texts.
Hero.subtitle: Send a photo or describe your meal. AI handles the rest — calories, macros, streaks, all in iMessage.

Features.heading: Everything happens in your texts
Features.subtitle: No app to download. No accounts to create. Just iMessage.

snapOrText.title: Snap or Text
snapOrText.description: Send a meal photo and see calories, macros, and easy tweaks before you log it.

dailySummaries.title: Daily Summaries
dailySummaries.description: See where your calories and macros stand so you know what you have left today.

smartReminders.title: Smart Reminders
smartReminders.description: Get meal-time reminders that help you stay on top of calories and macros.

bot0.breakfast: Good morning. Send breakfast when you're ready and I'll estimate the calories and macros.
bot0.lunch: Lunch time. Send a photo and I'll estimate the calories and macros for you.
bot0.dinner: Dinner check-in. Send a photo and I'll break down the calories and macros.

snapOrText.user1: What if I skip the pita?
snapOrText.bot1:
That looks like a Mediterranean bowl. I'd log it at about 690 kcal.

🫓 Pita wedge 160 kcal
🧆 Chickpeas 210 kcal
🥒 Cucumber, tomato & peppers 70 kcal
🫒 Olives 90 kcal
🥣 Yogurt sauce 80 kcal
🌿 Greens, figs & extras 80 kcal

Estimated macros: 58g carbs, 32g fat, 19g protein

You're at 1,420 / 2,100 kcal today with 680 left. If you want, I can adjust it for no pita, less sauce, or a smaller portion.
snapOrText.bot2: Good call, dropping the pita saves you 160 kcal. Here's the updated version:
snapOrText.bot3:

🥒 Cucumber, tomato & peppers 70 kcal

🥣 Yogurt sauce 80 kcal
🌿 Greens, figs & extras 80 kcal

That leaves you about 840 kcal for the rest of the day. Want me to log this version?

smartReminders.bot2:
Nice. I'd put that around 760 kcal depending on the scoop sizes.

I can log 760 now, or tighten it up if you send a photo.

HowItWorks.heading: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. No downloads. No setup screens.

step1.title: Text Caltext
step1.description: Send a message to get started. Caltext learns your goals, body stats, and preferences in a quick chat.

step2.title: Log Your Meals
step2.description: Text what you ate or snap a photo. AI identifies the food, looks up nutrition, and logs it instantly.

step3.title: Stay on Track
step3.description: Get daily summaries, weekly recaps, streak tracking, and friendly reminders at meal times.

Faq.heading: FAQs
Faq.q1: How does Caltext track my calories?
Faq.a1: Text your meals or snap a photo. Caltext uses AI to identify the food and portions, then looks up accurate nutrition data from the USDA database. It tracks your calories, protein, carbs, fat, and fiber automatically.
Faq.q2: What do I need to get started?
Faq.a2: Just an iPhone with iMessage. No app to download, no account to create. Text Caltext and you're up and running in under 2 minutes.
Faq.q3: Do I need to weigh my food?
Faq.a3: Not at all. Rough estimates work great — just describe portions naturally like "a big bowl of pasta" or "two slices of pizza." Photos work even better since the AI can estimate portion sizes visually.
Faq.q4: How does the free trial work?
Faq.a4: You get full access to all features during the trial period. Track meals, get summaries, set reminders — everything. No credit card required to start.
Faq.a5: Caltext detects your language from your phone number and responds accordingly. English and Swedish are fully supported, with more languages coming soon.

BottomCta.heading: Start tracking today
BottomCta.subtitle: Open iMessage and text Caltext. You'll be tracking calories in under two minutes.
BottomCta.buttonHint: Opens iMessage on your Mac or iPhone
